generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that foreign tech companies are secretly undermining our strategic autonomy? They're flooding our markets with cheap, low-quality goods while our own industries struggle. It's not just about trade—it's about national security. We need to support our own manufacturers and stop relying on unreliable foreign suppliers. #SupportLocal #StrategicAutonomy
